form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (23.31) at this track over 401m. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (23.31) at this track over 401m. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Midway down back straight was hampered.

form.formComment: Returns from a ten weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a fifth (25.24) over 440m at Goulburn. Expected to feature prominently.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a ten weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a fifth (25.24) over 440m at Goulburn. Expected to feature prominently.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on nearing the entrance to the home straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 10 lengths behind Mister Anatoly over 401m. Major threat on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 10 lengths behind Mister Anatoly over 401m. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 5.5 lengths in 18.44, beating Despicable Milo. Last start finished 4th over 320m at this track beaten 4 lengths (18.64) behind Anjo Ruby in a Grade 5 on April 12. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 5.5 lengths in 18.44, beating Despicable Milo. Last start finished 4th over 320m at this track beaten 4 lengths (18.64) behind Anjo Ruby in a Grade 5 on April 12. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Resumes from a 11 weeks spell and was in the minors at only other fresh up run, finishing second at big odds over 340m at Bulli. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes from a 11 weeks spell and was in the minors at only other fresh up run, finishing second at big odds over 340m at Bulli. Hard to have this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels checked in the first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Finished seventh (23.10) last time over 400m at Bulli. Others better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished seventh (23.10) last time over 400m at Bulli. Others better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was hampered in the first turn and forced wide.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Richmond Straight over 324m. Others favoured this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Richmond Straight over 324m. Others favoured this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels entering first turn.
Came together in the early stages of the first turn and lost momentum.
